title: Closed to new applicants: Start-up visa optional open work permit - Canada.ca
content:
## Start-up visa optional work permit

## Closed: Start-up visa optional open work permit
Closed to new applicants
As of December 19, 2025, we’re no longer accepting new applications.
If you already have a work permit under the Start-up Visa Program, you may be able to extend it while your permanent residence application is being processed.
This open work permit
- is valid for up to 3 years
- lets you work as an entrepreneur to develop your business
- lets you work for almost any employer in Canada to supplement your income
